since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +6.82%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC -0.31% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +6.82%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +6.82%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PUBM is the standout at +9.90%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +9.90%, NOW +9.76%, SNOW +8.96%, WDAY +8.82%, DV +8.75%. Laggards: TER -8.81%, NXPI -8.32%, QCOM -8.00%, HPE -6.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.53% at $152.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
